## How to test

- [ ] Ran `node tests/text-detector.test.js`
- [ ] Loaded unpacked in `chrome://extensions` and verified the change in a real page
- [ ] Added a new test if behaviour changed

## Checklist

- [ ] No new outbound network calls (TruthLens is on-device)
- [ ] No new permissions added without strong justification
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if user-visible
